strengths: Official SDK; stock and option historical clients; snapshots and chain endpoints
limitations: You still need your own backtest engine / brokerage simulator logic
best_fit_for_you: Required base layer for pulling stock and option data from Alpaca

strengths: Vectorized, Numba-accelerated, very fast across many parameter combos

best_fit_for_you: Best choice for rapidly testing many 1-minute stock/ETF scalping variations

strengths: Small API, fast, easy charts and optimizer, easy to get started

strengths: Mature framework, reusable strategies, analyzers, event-driven logic

primary_use: strategy framework with backtesting and broker support

limitations: Indicator library only; not a full execution simulator
